set.body: Remediation of the 2026-07-08 three-lane code-review findings vs PRD.md. Tests are green 49/49 JVM+JS but do not exercise the failure modes found: beta==0 gemv/gemm divergence, sparse/solver writes ignoring destination offset+stride, COO.t canonical-flag lie, scale-dependent rank tolerance, rows*cols overflow, silent MatrixMarket misparse, fake BlockJacobi, CGNR labeled lsqr, workspace overloads that allocate anyway. Seven phase beads block this epic; full detailed plan stickied on board topic 'remediation-plan'. Sequencing: p0,p1 gate p2; p2 gates p3; p4 parallel to p3; p5 after p2; p6 parallelizable (do gale-laws module first).
set.title: Epic: post-assessment remediation — correctness, honest APIs, doctrine
